# @microlink/google

> Google Search API for LLMs, AI agents, copilots, and developer tools.

@microlink/google is a Node.js package that turns Google products such as Search, News, Images, Videos, Places, Maps, Shopping, Scholar, Patents, and Autocomplete into structured API responses.

It is designed for:

- tool-calling systems
- retrieval and RAG pipelines
- research copilots
- news monitoring workflows
- local and entity lookup
- developer products that need fresh Google data without parsing raw SERP HTML

Key capabilities:

- structured Google Search results
- Google News, Images, Videos, Shopping, Scholar, Maps, Places, Patents, and Autocomplete support
- lazy `html()` and `markdown()` fetch for full-page markup
- pagination with `next()`
- type-aware fields such as title, url, description, ratings, coordinates, and image metadata

Primary page:

- Docs and landing page: https://search.microlink.io

Source and package:

- GitHub: https://github.com/microlinkhq/google
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@microlink/google
